title: Point Blank Official || Doom Pack
description: Official content pack for Vic's Point Blank adding weapons from the Doom franchise
body:
![wallpaper](https://i.imgur.com/U7HAUHe.png)

This is an official extension pack for Point Blank that adds weapons from the Doom franchise.



The pack includes numerous iconic weapons with special animated effects, such as the BFG-9000 and the Plasma Rifle. It will be regularly updated to include new weapons from the various games.

This pack is also meant to serve as an example for the Point Blank community when creating their own packs with special visual effects.

![wallpaper](https://i.imgur.com/4RIH57a.png)

Locate your directory--the same place where your mods folder, your resource packs folder, saves, etc. are at. Create a new folder in there called 'pointblank'

Inside this folder, put the content pack zip file you installed. You can have as many content packs in there as you want.

![wallpaper](https://i.imgur.com/nc9WLAi.png)

Done!

Once you load the game, the content pack will be installed. This process also works for installing content pack on servers. Be advised that players joining a server will also need to install the same content packs.
